final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean café coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays on each element — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean café aesthetic shot in a casual smartphone photography style, suitable for Instagram Stories — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn white-pen annotation lines and arrows pointing to each visible element (drinks, food, space details), with deliberate negative space left between annotations
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as focal subjects, no people
Scene/backdrop: needs a Korean café interior atmosphere — exact décor details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, editorial café atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, trendy café direction — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a rough, hand-drawn overlay texture — exact line weight variation and imperfection level are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) in white pen style, one short diary-voice comment per element, following these rules:
  • 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：「すっきり」「やさしい甘さ」）
  • 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：「しっとり」「さいこう」）
  • 空間 → 雰囲気（例：「ほっとする」「いい時間」）
  • 全体一言 → （例：「しあわせすぎた〜」）
  Decorative elements: 蒸気のイラスト / キラキラ / ハート / 小さな顔文字 を適度に添える
Constraints: must preserve hand-drawn line style — single-stroke rough slightly uneven white lines tracing object outlines; arrows or dashed lines for visual flow; Instagram Stories / magazine rough-notes finish; annotations must feel like diary entries, not labels
Avoid: must avoid over-decorated or cluttered layout — preserve breathing room / negative space between annotations; must avoid any human figures or faces
